ops.body: Landed: feature commit 6389fc2e6288 (path-scoped ship of 25 paths out of the shared @), lint follow-up 8215e435; CI green on trunk 5e0ab43a incl. live jj+git hunk-scoped tests under CI-installed jj. All acceptance criteria verified: refs list + resolve, both lanes zero-mutation, empty/drift refusals, subdir round-trips, docs (README/AGENTS entry 13 via cc-skills 86777bab/SKILL.md/CHANGELOG).
